title: Login with valid credentials
test_steps: Open the ESPN Radio app. | Navigate to the login screen. | Enter 'username@example.com' into the 'Username' field. | Enter 'password123' into the 'Password' field. | Tap the 'Sign In' button.
expected_result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the home screen.

title: Login with invalid credentials
test_steps: Open the ESPN Radio app. | Navigate to the login screen. | Enter 'invalidusername@example.com' into the 'Username' field. | Enter 'wrongpassword123' into the 'Password' field. | Tap the 'Sign In' button.
expected_result: A 'Wrong username or password' error message is displayed.

title: Login with empty fields
test_steps: Open the ESPN Radio app. | Navigate to the login screen. | Enter an empty string into the 'Username' field. | Enter an empty string into the 'Password' field. | Tap the 'Sign In' button.
expected_result: A 'Username and password are required' error message is displayed.
